activities_projects.title: Constructing Parallelogram
activities_projects.objective: Learn to construct a parallelogram using ruler and compass
steps: Take two adjacent sides and the included angle
Construct parallelogram using compass and ruler

activities_projects.title: Constructing Rhombus
steps: Use compass to draw arcs to locate vertices

activities_projects.title: Angle Sum Verification
activities_projects.objective: Verify sum of angles in quadrilaterals equals 360°
steps: Measure all four angles using protractor
Add angles and verify sum is 360°
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands angle sum property of quadrilaterals

activities_projects.title: Perimeter of Quadrilaterals
steps: Add side lengths to calculate perimeter

activities_projects.title: Area Using Formula
activities_projects.objective: Calculate area of rectangle, square, parallelogram
steps: Use area formulas to calculate area

activities_projects.title: Diagonals and Their Properties
activities_projects.objective: Explore properties of diagonals in quadrilaterals
steps: Observe intersection, lengths, and angles formed

activities_projects.title: Identifying Special Quadrilaterals
activities_projects.objective: Differentiate square, rectangle, rhombus, parallelogram using properties
steps: Classify as square, rectangle, rhombus, or parallelogram
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises special quadrilaterals based on properties

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: Observe and record quadrilateral shapes around you
steps: Look for quadrilateral objects around home or school
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects geometry concepts to real-life objects

activities_projects.title: Comparing Diagonal Lengths
activities_projects.objective: Measure and compare diagonals in quadrilaterals
steps: Measure both diagonals in each shape

activities_projects.title: Naming Quadrilaterals
steps: Label vertices as A, B, C, D
